rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current annex scope or declared as helpers.
When AGREE diagnostics report '<error>' types, trace and resolve the first invalid identifier or helper declaration on the same line.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, only reference features or helpers that are declared within the same annex or are visible in the current scope.
Use assign statements only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use component type annexes for guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assume and guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean types.
Helper declarations (eq) must be valid expressions with known types.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE reference errors; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation-level annexes; they belong in component type annexes.
